projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Next: read chip XID 0x40 + variant init. (HANDOFF unchanged since 2026-04-19.)
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

projects.name: Antcolony (PvP pivot)
projects.handoff_excerpt: Session 2026-05-09 (evening): 2yr HeuristicBrain smoke CATASTROPHIC — 6/8 species extinct at seasonal transitions, 2/8 surviving via food-overaccumulation bug. Falsifies prior hypothesis that yr-1 hibernation extinctions were a brain artifact. Two distinct extinction modes: autumn pre-diapause cliff + spring diapause-exit cliff. Three sim bugs identified, none yet fixed. Project Status: BLOCKED on outreach — defensible-biology bar not met.
milestones_hit: Phase 1 sim foundation implementation plan landed (TDD, 11 tasks)
10yr AI smoke harness + MLP-OOD finding shipped, +B.chinensis +Temnothorax species onboarded
blockers: Outreach roadmap fully gated — 2yr HeuristicBrain smoke is 0/8 in defensible-biology terms (6 extinctions + 2 false-positive survivors via food-overaccumulation bug). Three sim bugs identified, none yet fixed.

projects.name: claudeai workbench
projects.handoff_excerpt: 2026-05-09/10 mesh-fleet-gateway-swap marathon — outcome: rollback to TP-Link planned. Cross-unit network degraded: AC-1304 802.11s mesh cannot reliably bridge the duplex shared wall. 6% end-to-end loss kokonoe→internet, 3% on the mesh hop alone. Discord/voice broken. 6x AC-1304 rebuild on OpenWrt 25.12.3 + DAWN landed; ~10h spent solving the wrong problem.
milestones_hit: 6x AC-1304 rebuild on OpenWrt 25.12.3 + DAWN landed end-to-end (still planned for rollback to TP-Link due to wall-loss issue)
blockers: Cross-unit network degraded — AC-1304 802.11s mesh can't bridge the duplex shared wall, 6% kokonoe→internet loss, Discord/voice broken. Rollback to TP-Link is the planned fix.

strategic_events.detail: Incognito CAD Tool weekend-MVP sprint COMPLETE — LightBurn .lbrn2 exporter rewrite, STEP guardrails (sub-threshold inset drop, concentric-circle dedup, arrange-on-by-default), installer fixes, 109/109 tests passing. Customer-deliverable binary + install.ps1 + README staged for Matt's Nova 24+ workstation. 2 of 5 fixture devices ship clean (PEQ-15, DBAL-A3); 3 fail safely with tier=rejected.
PerformanceTracker — full 8.5-year HealthKit export ingested. 47MB zip, 2,498,115 records, back to 2017-10. Streaming aggregator emits 3,126 days of daily rollups under data/healthkit-aggregates/.

Aether Roadmap v3 closed 100% (68/68); v4 second pass to 123/196 (63%) witnessed. Remaining 73 items recorded as honest FR-N entries in NEXT-UP.md (now reorganized from flat catalog to navigable critical path with path-letter attack order).

visionsystem Round 14 + 15.2 — OSNet ReID body-identity backbone live, embeddings split out of JSON. Self-bootstrap fat enrollment (200 vecs) + top-K mean matcher live. Face top_sim jumped 0.78–0.87 → 0.92–0.97, threshold margin ~5× wider.

exploitpipe scaffolded — new defensive-RE pipeline project bootstrapped from Eleos CVP-program 0-day video review. Hard rules locked (no jailbreaks, defensive-only, cost caps, deterministic-first). Campaign 1 target: Win11 BYOVD. Decompiler: Ghidra. VM: Hyper-V on kokonoe. 54-item build-harness design spec recorded.

school project bootstrapped — AI-coursework grant-funding strategic plan with FAFSA → SBIR EV math. Real numbers pulled from Abacus (4 months Personal-account transactions). Discovered Matt's W-2 Gusto job (~$25K/yr, missing from prior Claude context). 2025 AGI estimate: -$4,250.

Antcolony — 2yr HeuristicBrain sim smoke CATASTROPHIC: 6/8 species extinct at seasonal transitions, 2/8 surviving via food-overaccumulation bug. Falsifies prior hypothesis that yr-1 hibernation extinctions were a brain artifact. Outreach roadmap fully gated until defensible-biology bar is met. Three sim bugs identified, none yet fixed.

claudeai workbench — cross-unit network DEGRADED. ~10h marathon rebuilt 6× AC-1304 mesh on OpenWrt 25.12.3 + DAWN, but 802.11s mesh cannot reliably bridge the duplex shared wall to the Comcast modem unit. 6% end-to-end loss kokonoe→internet, 3% on the mesh hop alone. Discord/voice broken. Rollback to TP-Link is the planned fix.

Antcolony engineering decision queued: Phase 1 sim foundation implementation plan landed (TDD, 11 tasks). 10yr AI smoke harness produced an MLP-OOD finding; +B.chinensis +Temnothorax onboarded as new species TOMLs.

notes: Big work day. Six projects had real (non-uploader) commits today: antcolony (6 / 3,388 LOC — catastrophic 2yr smoke + Phase 1 plan), aether (8 / 8,807 LOC — roadmap v3 closure + v4 second pass), claudeai (2 / 1,229 LOC — mesh rebuild, planned rollback), incognito-cad (7 / 17,060 LOC — weekend MVP sprint complete), visionsystem (4 / 1,706 LOC — OSNet ReID + fat enrollment), exploitpipe (7 / 1,675 LOC — new project scaffolded), llm-wiki (1 / 149 LOC — ingest pass). PerformanceTracker HANDOFF was rewritten with the 8.5-yr HealthKit ingest milestone but the only commit on its repo today was github-uploader churn — substantive work counted via HANDOFF + lines for the week. Five new projects added to the report vs yesterday: abacus-meatspace, claude-optimize-my-week, clawhub-customer-hunter, exploitpipe (new), github-SME, school (new, not a git repo yet). The github-uploader pattern still creates a daily 'Initial commit' on most repos (CT≈1, LT≈2); those have been zeroed out in commits_today / lines_changed_today and recorded only when they reflect real activity. Two NEW blockers added today: antcolony outreach gating + claudeai mesh degradation. Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client harvest skipped — no Gmail/Calendar connector on kokonoe.
